data: An orb like object luminated white, or light yellow light intensely, close to the surface.
Orb dimming and brightening, then making high speed maneuvers.
In daylight a black object stopped in the sky
Spinner S Shape like a boomerang.
High altitude stationary object reflecting sunlight every few seconds.
Cigar shaped and slow moving then silver sun reflection disappearing into low lying clouds
A line of hovering blinking lights
Red non blinking, completely silent light that turned into 3
We were seeing laser show at Statue of Belief and suddenly we saw in the 6 circle like discs going high in the sky.
I saw a large white cylinder in the sky over Rock Island Washington
2 triangular (like a paper airplane) flying objects
We saw a large disc shaped craft with three levels of windows. It hovered silently and then disappeared into thin air.
While looking at vultures circling above I noticed something glinting sunlight above at approximately 65-70° that was silver and silent
Zooming at a blistering speed, a streak in the sky
A strange light arrangement that is not seen on normal aircraft
Made strange movements then went 90 degrees right then 90 degrees left in about a second.
Large craft seen in the sky on Main Street in East Hartford, CT. Craft seen changing directions and hovering.
Craft sighted two nights in row now
I look up for one second to look outside and I see a flying donut.
It was seen by two people and it was the best feeling ever
A lime green line traveling south west towards north eastish
Small grey arc got closer and closer and seemed to become gigantic disk shaped object
Was gazing out window and saw strange lights over the lake
I was sitting on my back porch looking north, and I saw a shimmering object standing still, and then it flew over my apartment.
I saw one irregular black object. My picture shows up to 11 maybe more
Craft moved rapidly lighting up on and off
Family noticed a slow moving object with no sound. The object was red and faint to the eye. No sound and slow moving
Light appears, bright, catching my attention…. Disappears instantly
3 photos taken seconds apart all timed stamped 12:35
A long blue nebula like haze was spotted while driving down Mt. Lemmon, it turned into white lights (12-16) which rotated around a disc
8-12 white lights in a straight, horizontal line just above the trees.
The sphere appeared as a fireball, initially hovering in the air, and then it flew (right to left)
I saw an oblong shaped white object above to my left that was low altitude moving from E to W with slight more westerly direction.
Moving light shining down on me
Craft flew over hesitated long enough for brief video
Orb shape that flickered or pulsed (visible to the naked eye) in the western sky as it moved erratically and randomly.
silver sphere or disc hovering and rotating
A flying object with flashes of various colors was spotted at about 10,000 feet and was descending
Viewed 2 parallel objects one above the other going same speed.
Looked like bottom right curve of moon, was soft red and orange.
Huge Eagle flew down close to us and then the UAP was seen for 15 seconds.
Witnessed two flashing objects moving very erratically
Bright, orange lights over the ocean seen with erratic, white lights.
Lights near the Big Dipper appear, travel with constant velocity, brighten to yellow and dim to white before disappearing.
While driving back into town from the north I noticed a luminous craft over Downtown Orlando or slightly East of.
Triangle shaped aircraft made up of 3 bright blinking lights and one very faint light
Strange object caught on my home camera shooting across the sky.
Group observed a helicopter circling a lighted object for several minutes. Object changed shape and departed rapidly to the east.
Bright Triangle Craft Hovering Next to Cloud
Red and green lights were expanding and contracting repeatedly while also remaining in the same position in the sky
Walking home I seen white lights flash for an instant, above and in front of the moon.
Three bright lights in a triangle shape
Saw a light come into my yard
Very bright light. It was still light out. The light stayed around for 5 to 10 minutes and then just disappeared
Heard a giant boom then saw this very bright slowly rise up behind the trees. It got faster and faster.
Dark object that seems to have multiple shapes and genetic makeup (smokey yet also partly physical object)
It came down from the clouds then disappeared over the tree line heading almost true North .
Oval shaped object circled around directly above, then dipped down, changed form, became obscured by blurry air and disappeared.
Silver static egg liked object hovered in the distance. Sun reflected off it. It pulsed with a light and then disappeared into thin air
We were laying in the front yard and looking up in the sky and my friend saw something shinny and bright and round.
2 light naked eye thought they were stars but they moved
Viewed 4 metallic objects shaped like a football, smaller than a plane, but bigger than a car.
I saw a oval object with a very bright light zoom from behind me then stopped and disappeared.
My wife and I were leasing at Jim Lake near Palmer and saw this object and then we saw it in a picture I took.
I was just outside having a smoke and saw it. Not sure what it was have video
A small bright light in the sky that appeared suddenly then faded away with no trail, and was moving slowly for ~5 seconds
Triangle shape, solid glow. No sound.
Saw 2 flying objects that looked like planes, but were stopping and turning randomly in different directions.
Just noticed this in the sky while laying in the yard. It slowly moved across the sky until disappearing behind a tree.
Tail-like lights whipping and floating up and down.
Seen by naked eye and thru camera lens with pictures. Then all of a sudden the camera froze and turned darker blue
Looked like 2 orbs spinning around each other. And reflecting sunlight as it’s spinning. No sound and floating like balloons very high
Multiple craft flying in multiple directions even from straight up from the ground. Cows are losing it right now.
We were sitting on our balcony and looked up to see 3 oval/spherical objects flying in a triangular formation. .
It changed shape from square to zigzag, changed direction and ht, in my barnyard. Faced the coop and moved to front of my wood shed.
Three orbs in a line coming up from the ground
Glowing orange orb that moved swiftly at about 3,000ft from west to east on a very straight path. Observed through binoculars.
It was about the length of a school bus shot straight up in the air and shot off to the north while getting very bright and left trail
Saw a large disk hovering -flying over the mountain top really close to the tree line and went up and over bearfort mountain.
Initially seen by naked eye, but slowly elevated and was out of sight within 30 minutes.
Have video of white light/formation. Then 7 star like lights sped away 30 second intervals
Adult male and 9 year old child watched a orb/sphere move slowly in the sky, and it looked like there was propulsion out of bottom.
Two Lights in Lee's Summit, MO SW Sky, One Disappeared while other Remained for 45 min.
Black triangle very low no noise
In the Starlink tail first one object are seen and recorded playing in the tail of the satellite then a second object appeared.
Saw black object appear, no noise guessing 5000 feet in the air. Seemed smaller than a Cessna aircraft. No lights or sound.
Flashing light hovering for several minutes above the cloud height that proceeded to move to the north west and vanishing
Sphere in the sky that glowed like an LED light and appeared/disappeared multiple times, at times pulsating.
Large object hovering over summit of Redoubt volcano
Spinning green light moving extremely fast as seen in video
Erratically moving light at high altitude
Triangular UFO with white, red, maybe blue lights.
Saw unexplainable lights slightly west of North in Key West
Saw two objects in sky, one floated and one sped away within half a second.
My wife and I as well as our 2 children witnessed multiple flashing silent objects .
Footage from a security camera 1 min prior and one minute following the actual footage, the UFO appeared suddenly.
Asymmetrical cigar shaped object captured in slow motion making rotational maneuver
6 triangular objects overhead, heading west in very tight formation.
The object was photographed while photographing the full moon
3 objects looking like lanterns morph into drone-shapes. Start at different times but in same location and fly same direction.
Two quick successions of flashing silver oval shapes nearly overlapping
Moved in a straight line. Clear blue sky.
Spiky Black VW Bug sized and shaped object 500 ft high, 80 mph, flew over house, no sound, looked evil.
Metal cylinder, under it a blue light
White orb comes up above trees and house next door and takes a right turn and heads west across the front of the house til out of sight
Stationary object over Boston Harbor, MA
I thought that is was a jet stream at first and then the lights got brighter, it went across the sky then disappeared
Thought at first balloon, but it was stationary in sky,looked through binoculars and saw a saucer shaped object just sitting in sky.
Light was directly overhead. Flashing colors moving eratically in small circles, wandering and back and forth, with instant stopping.
Brilliant White Light that resembled a Star or Planet in Bright Daylight at first sighting.
One Plasma-UFO with bright white light was seen in the southern sky at 2:20 a.m.
A flying object with a main light and a string of lights aligned and another fast flying object that dissapeared
The first was spotted directly over brown mountain, only 20-30 seconds duration, second one was recorded same description
Stationary cylinder that quickly disappeared after several minutes.
Observed a white orb traveling through blue skies
Two boomeranged ship were very high
Clear night brightest light ever seen don’t know how long it was there, just remember a white and blue beam and it disappeared
Translucent circle with bright white light outline, and somewhat crooked vertical line up the middle.
Flying north to south from 2 sources
Air moving straight down toward me walked into field, looked up, shined a flashlight, saw a distortion of my light then anomaly gone
This is the third night we have seen such objects...looking like stars but moving quickly...eminating out of the area of the Big Dipper
A reflective shape changing object caught my eye just before sunrise. It then stayed stationary in the sky until clouds covered it
Seen what looked like a balloon but moving quickly in a strait direction no way a balloon could ever move from wind
Round reflective odd moving shapes internally. Stationary
While taking photos on the Beltline of a retired rocket-shaped lookout tower, a tad-pole shaped craft appeared in the sky.
Saw a round object go by slower than a plane
NJ Turnpike near mile marker 44. Saw metallic/silver/chrome sphere-like object. Completely stationary. after 30 secs, disappeared
I was filming dragonflies in my yard when suddenly a silver object with a red stripe caught my eye it was falling very fast
Appeared orb that floated around then disappeared
3 Nights of Stars that Spawn for about 3 Seconds then Dissapear in the same Location
I saw a white tic tac object flying back and forth slowly no sound or chem trail then about 20 minute later a military aircraft flew by
Shimmering oval shaped sphere moving through the clouds
Triangle object seen on the sky above the city.
A white light appeared and moved down and disappeared
White cylindrical object spotted flying east to west shortly before planes with contrails, which this object didn't have
Flashing orb hovering and rotating from far distance and moving in a weird way at crazy speed or just standing still in place hovering
Object was first observed bearing N x W of location provided. Object slowly transited from west to east over several hours.
Heard commercial plane overhead. Saw white sphere flying near plane. Sphere hovered/loitered ~10 seconds, then zoomed off & disappeared
Bright shining light hovering in the sky then vanishing after a few minutes.
Lights in low earth orbit illuminating brightly then fading, staying stationary, then moving in multiple directions, then orbiting
It looks like a tandem diamond-shaped almost pod racer from Star wars swoop down and split into two veering off to the West it's split
White weird shaped object slow moving. Started in front of a plane heading south from Fargo airport.
It looked like I was watching a video of when the space shuttle exploded
There were two cigar shaped objects flanking a commercial airplane
Thought maybe an old satellite, but in a minute made 2 other hard rt turns. A lg passenger jet intersected over the top of the object
It looks like a white ball that is very very slowly moving east.
My daughter and I were sitting on our back deck yesterday evening and she spotted a white object in the sky. This object made no noise
It was hovering in the sky for about 30 minutes and started to move slowly
2 blimp-shaped objects appear to flash and disappear into the clouds.
When I saw the UAP it hovered for about 3 seconds before it went up then vertically to the right and then to the left then disappeared
5pm outside looking up at commercial planes and birds, saw white "star" "planet", very high compared to planes. no details/movement
I exited my garage and seen a bright white light through the trees so I run out into my backyard and I see it for a second, then Vanish
Commercial aircraft sized elliptical object, with no visible wings. Shiny silver, reflecting the setting sun on the lower rear portion
Blue Orbs in Triangle or V Shape. Merge to orange orb. With other swirling lights in the vicinity.
Very high small object flash on/off
It was a small white dot that alternated between shifting between every color of the rainbow, then it would rotate and move away
We saw an oval/pear shaped craft 1-2 miles away that had an extremely bright orange light on it.
We saw an orb of light shaped like a donut slowly brighten, slowly dim, hover, and then disappear.
I saw a coffin-shaped craft moving amongst the clouds emitting red lightning and making horrific noises
The craft came from the right and went through a cloud then stopped I was reaching for my camera, then it went down.
First appeared at a lower altitude. When camera was in process of taking photo object pulled away to higher altitude.
A solid white cigar or tic tac shape, off in the western sky, as I walked out my front door.
Silver Metallic Globe Hovers Stationary in Clear Sky, Suddenly Disappears.
Attached video was shot with my cell phone after noticing the unusual light in the sky
I was driving home in the middle of nowhere when I seen a line of 7 lights moving slow disappearing and reappearing in a different spot
8 orbs all moving independently of each other close to the horizon
I was taking video of a lightning storm and the object streaked across my view
The blue lights are back, flying one after another 1.5 minutes apart or parallel as two (3' or 4' held at arm's length apart)
See the same orb at least twice a week.
Triangle with 3 white dots at its corners, moving slowly until it disappeared.
Sister got a photo of black triangle object
Long thin object hovered and changed position from vertical to horizontal
Father’s Day night/early am object in the sky.
Lights in the west 45° above the horizon approximately 4 miles in the distance, objects moved slowly at first an left
Stationary white orb before slowly moving and fading away.
On June 27th 2024 I witnessed my first daytime event taking the 315 north exit to 270 West looking south within meters of the east 270
Observed 2 orbs flying erratically, high acceleration, appeared coordinated
The oval craft floated in its spot high in the sky almost helicopter level. It seem to then be circling slow and tightly.
This object has shot sparks of light in front of my house on the sidewalk and the grassy area across from my home.
I did File a Reported to the Brantford Police
It was a sphere, looking black/silver, flying north over the building.
Viewing moon through binoculars witnessed green light traveling at high rate of speed directly up.
a big object with a light source (rotating and shining visibly) in the middle, connecting two gleaming "clouds"
Driving-bright light "vehicle" came out of nowhere in the country made no noise was close enough to touch us for 1.5 mi & disappeared
it seemed to be shining. they made a circle.flies.I saw it twice in two months. I hope I’ll see thi tomorrow too, I wanna make a video
A bright light in the sky hovering the Columbus airshow
Iridescent bubble with dark object inside turned into a golden disk and remained in place for approximately 30 minutes then faded back
Two crafts, one silver reflective sphere the other dull gold and black wrinkled look.
Facing south in rural Rapid City darkness No craft. Just a beam of light angled left and a big white colored ball at the end.
The object appeared like an ice cream cone shape that was changing colors with very bright lights
A freely moving star-like light, not too big or too small, with no trails. It moves in straight lines but changes direction every sec
8 orbs appeared and reappeared, zipping through the clouds and rain, above Utah lake, and VERY near Provo Airport.
Coming home from getting food, there were multiple, aircraft’s hovering in the sky. Not stars they were in the atmosphere.
A cone light appeared and changed form, aircraft in the back moving.
The unknown craft was moving at a reasonable speed, had 3 lights don’t know if they were separate helicopters, appeared to move as one.
I was sitting on my front porch smoking a cigar and this orb flew at about 200' towards me and over the house
Saw four lights that appeared attached to a single craft , no blinking and no sounds at a distance of one mile .
Passing of 9 lights in chevron formation, low, fast and then passing again overhead
Saw the UFO at my church.  (meteor)
I was driving down IL-120 and saw 3 lights in a triangle shape.
3 objects in triangular formation. 1 object appears to be 2 parts orbiting one another
It was very fast and left a trail behind. It was a thick and long beam of light. It was glowing.
Black circle that looked like it had a surrounding energy field
Seen from KCC Mall over bay. Object falls from the sky as a light, stops, zips leftward, and hovers over sea appearing as a black oval.
They hover for up to 10 hours in the evening and sometimes move. They are not airplanes. Only white.
The craft moved a high speed to three different locations and could stop instantly.
Square/rectangular appearing flat, like a sheet, rubber-like
Fast flying bright orb on the sky
We had witnessed at least six orbs being stationary, but would move slightly except for one
Object made sky “glow” before coming into focus. Moved from left to right. No sound. Fairly quick moving. Then vanished. light trail
Two discs with orbiting lights were observed hovering above Baltimore, Maryland port.
I viewed from second story window of residence
I was heading to the store when my wife mentioned to me about some lights in the sky that we observed for 5 minutes before they disappe
I was taking pictures of the sky, when I saw those lights, and they disappeared in a second.
We saw a reflective object moving S to N, lowering in altitude, moving east, then change to flying east, then lost it
Extremely fast moving red light that moved horizonal and then vertical.
Witnessed orange orb in middle of night. Upon visual the Orb changed to a solid orange ring and shot off to my left
I seen what looked to be a "frisbee with lights" spin across the sky at a pretty low altitde.
Was driving east and saw orbs in sky
I saw something shiny catch my eye, I looked up and saw a ufo, and right as my eyes focused I made eye contact with a gray alien
Multiple different types of UFOs above me
Large silent orb moving slowly and rapidly changing colors
Looking through binoculars, white lights, flashing rapidly back and forth. Hovering over the mountain
Went outside and noticed something watching me, went back in and back out and it still there.
An extremely large craft crossing the sky directly overhead
Small drone-like cylindrical object flies bizarre and slowly away from mountain to out of view in the sky on video
we were sitting at the dam hanging out and I spotted the lights.
Circle burns shrinks to smaller light
Witnessed an arrowhead-type craft with 2 appendages connected behind. Stood still and silent for a minimum of 47 minutes.
Seen the craft on the security monitor, then went outside to see myself.
I and two others saw a bright white light in western sky while driving home after sunset.
Looking through a telescope I saw a glowing sphere up in a thunderstorm lasted too long to be ball lightning unless rare phenomen.
An object was flying over the Organ Mountains-Desert Peaks National Monument
We were trying to see if it was a helicopter. Unfortunately, it disappeared as if it flew behind a curtain. Clear blue sky, no clouds!
3 orange objects travelling separately from Sandbanks across the bay at 60ft over the sea then passed me on the cliff
8 moving lights came in from east to west then hovered over me during daylight hours
Collective 1-hour time anomaly in Najaf affecting analog/digital clocks, following previous UAP activity in the area
A red orb of light appered in front of my eyes. it stayed till I tried to open camera app on my phone, it disappeared instantly
The object SEEMED long in shape, like 2-3 school busses long, had uneven linear dim lights, blinking
3 star like figures that joined together and disappeared
Was sight seeing some satellites and shooting stars when a triangularcraft came and went, faster than anything I've ever seen
Light rose from cliff like lanterns, stopped at the same height, then shot east faster than a bullet.
